title: Nebula Render Arm
description: Outfits inspired by Squid Craft Game, compatible with Custom Player Models. Includes custom model and first-person support.
body:
**Español (ES):**
-
Este mod añade una colección de trajes inspirados en Squid Craft Game, permitiéndote personalizar a tu personaje con atuendos temáticos. Los trajes funcionan de manera independiente, pero también cuentan con soporte para Custom Player Models (CPM): si importas el modelo personalizado, obtendrás una experiencia más completa.

✨ Características:

Trajes icónicos inspirados en Squid Craft Game.

Compatibles con survival y creative.

El traje es visible en primera persona al mirar tu mano.

Funciona sin modelos externos, pero se recomienda usar el modelo de CPM para mayor inmersión.

Ideal para servidores temáticos, series o roleplay.

**⚠️ Nota: Este mod es un proyecto no oficial hecho por fans y no está afiliado ni respaldado por Squid Craft Game ni sus creadores.**

**English (EN):**
-
This mod adds a collection of outfits inspired by Squid Craft Game, allowing you to customize your character with themed clothing. The outfits work independently, but also include support for Custom Player Models (CPM): importing the custom model will enhance the overall experience.

✨ Features:

Iconic outfits inspired by Squid Craft Game.

Works in both survival and creative.

Outfits are visible in first person when looking at your hand.

Works without external models, but CPM model support is recommended for extra immersion.

Perfect for themed servers, series, or roleplay.

**⚠️ Disclaimer: This is an unofficial fan-made project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Squid Craft Game or its creators.**
